name: VisualAnalysisMode.AnalysisStyle
summary: Contains enumerated values for analysis styles, such as wireframe, texture or false colors..

enum_values.name: Wireframe
enum_values.summary: The analysis is showing with wires.

enum_values.name: Texture
enum_values.summary: The analysis is showing with textures.

enum_values.name: FalseColor
enum_values.summary: The analysis is showing with false colors.
